data.body: Preflight: epic 839b has 9 direct leaves at depth 1 (8 code stories, 1 docs task). Dependency order: 3b30 analyzer seam -> e7a0 config + 9597 metrics extra -> 18f9 scc, 21fb lizard, 3ba0 jscpd -> 0734 metric migration -> a532 polyglot validation -> a9dd docs. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/impl-839b-code-health on branch impl-839b-code-health at origin/main 73efe1e68. Landing method: configured identity lacks feature-branch-drivers membership, so use independently reviewed sequential Gerrit changes to refs/for/main, each gated LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, submitted before dependent work. Tooling: worktree .venv, shared executable commit-msg hook, module cap 800, canonical gates make lint/typecheck/test.
